2603.27533.title: Demo-Pose: Depth-Monocular Modality Fusion For Object Pose Estimation
2603.27533.paper_summary: Object pose estimation is a fundamental task in 3D vision with applications in robotics, AR/VR, and scene understanding. We address the challenge of category-level 9-DoF pose estimation (6D pose + 3Dsize) from RGB-D input, without relying on CAD models during inference. Existing depth-only methods achieve strong results but ignore semantic cues from RGB, while many RGB-D fusion models underperform due to suboptimal cross-modal fusion that fails to align semantic RGB cues with 3D geometric representations. We propose DeMo-Pose, a hybrid architecture that fuses monocular semantic features with depth-based graph convolutional representations via a novel multimodal fusion strategy. To further improve geometric reasoning, we introduce a novel Mesh-Point Loss (MPL) that leverages mesh structure during training without adding inference overhead. Our approach achieves real-time inference and significantly improves over state-of-the-art methods across object categories, outperforming the strong GPV-Pose baseline by 3.2\% on 3D IoU and 11.1\% on pose accuracy on the REAL275 benchmark. The results highlight the effectiveness of depth-RGB fusion and geometry-aware learning, enabling robust category-level 3D pose estimation for real-world applications.
2603.27533.paper_summary_zh: 物體姿態估計是3D視覺中的一項基本任務，應用於機器人技術、增強現實/虛擬現實以及場景理解。我們解決了從RGB-D輸入進行類別級9自由度姿態估計（6D姿態 + 3D大小）的挑戰，並且在推斷過程中不依賴CAD模型。現有的僅深度方法取得了良好的結果，但忽略了來自RGB的語義線索，而許多RGB-D融合模型因為次優的跨模態融合而表現不佳，未能將語義RGB線索與3D幾何表示對齊。我們提出了DeMo-Pose，一種混合架構，通過一種新穎的多模態融合策略，將單眼語義特徵與基於深度的圖卷積表示融合在一起。為了進一步改善幾何推理，我們引入了一種新穎的網格點損失（MPL），在訓練過程中利用網格結構，而不增加推斷開銷。我們的方法實現了實時推斷，並在各個物體類別上顯著超越了最先進的方法，在REAL275基準測試中，3D IoU比強大的GPV-Pose基線提高了3.2\%，姿態準確率提高了11.1\%。結果突顯了深度-RGB融合和幾何感知學習的有效性，使得在現實世界應用中實現穩健的類別級3D姿態估計成為可能。
2603.27533.author: Rachit Agarwal et.al.
2603.27533.authors: Rachit Agarwal, Abhishek Joshi, Sathish Chalasani, Woo Jin Kim
